# OSLCompareUPP

**Type Alias**

Defines a data type for the universal procedure pointer for the `OSLCompareProcPtr` callback function pointer.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias OSLCompareUPP = OSLCompareProcPtr
```

## Discussion

For a description of a compare callback function, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/oslcompareprocptr].
